heading: Miscellaneous provisions
label: 3378 Miscellaneous provisions

CodificationSubsecs. (d) and (e) of this section were in the original subsecs. (g) and (h), respectively, of and were redesignated for purposes of codification.section 9 of Pub. L. 97–79

children.heading: Effect on powers of States
children.label: a Effect on powers of States
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to prevent the several States or Indian tribes from making or enforcing laws or regulations not inconsistent with the provisions of this chapter.
The Act of (commonly known as the Black Bass Act; ).May 20, 192616 U.S.C. 851–856
and sections 43 and 44 of title 18 (commonly known as provisions of the Lacey Act).Section 667e of this title
repealing, superseding, or modifying any provision of Federal law other than those specified in subsection (b);

repealing, superseding, or modifying any right, privilege, or immunity granted, reserved, or established pursuant to treaty, statute, or executive order pertaining to any Indian tribe, band, or community; or
enlarging or diminishing the authority of any State or Indian tribe to regulate the activities of persons within Indian reservations.

children.heading: Travel and transportation expenses
children.label: d Travel and transportation expenses
children.text: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized to pay from agency appropriations the travel expense of newly appointed special agents of the United States Fish and Wildlife Service and the transportation expense of household goods and personal effects from place of residence at time of selection to first duty station to the extent authorized by for all such special agents appointed after .section 5724 of title 5January 1, 1977

children.heading: Interior appropriations budget proposal
children.label: e Interior appropriations budget proposal
children.text: The Secretary shall identify the funds utilized to enforce this chapter and any regulations thereto as a specific appropriations item in the Department of the Interior appropriations budget proposal to the Congress.
